diagnosis: L1 canary cannot proceed because wrtn auth is not actually established. The user landed on the password-setup step of the signup flow and did not complete it; without a valid session cookie the chat-submit handler silently no-ops (input retains text, transcript stays empty). This is independent of the card-keyword FP fix — the request never reaches the APF path. Need to either (a) complete signup by setting a password and finishing the security step, or (b) use an existing wrtn account credential to log in via /login first, then re-run #955.
next_iter_hint: Pre-flight auth check for wrtn must verify (i) wrtn.ai header shows profile avatar instead of 로그인 button, AND (ii) a test prompt produces a user bubble within 5s. If either fails, escalate to user for manual login before issuing canary. For #955 specifically: ask user to complete the 비밀번호 설정 step on the /wrtn/signup/security tab (or finish OAuth) and re-issue.
